scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client "npm --workspace website/server run dev" "npm --workspace website/client run dev"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n server,client "npm --workspace website/server run dev" "npm --workspace website/client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace website/client run build && npm run build:cpp
scripts.build:engine: cmake -S engine -B engine/build && cmake --build engine/build --config Release
scripts.build:cpp: cmake -S engine -B engine/build && cmake --build engine/build --config Release
